specific_question: Do Elexion Automotive's customer service representatives work more efficiently when they have the weekend off?
answer: Yes. According to our end-of-year 2024 data, all 42 of our customer service representatives work more efficiently after having a day or two off. We know that if we overwork our employees, we lose productivity. The data shows a 21% increase in productivity for rested employees.
dr_question: With the reported slowdown in the sales of electric vehicles (EV), how can after sales products and customer service strategies help our company remain successful in 2026?
